COMPANY
Home › Company

Olstral Production

CNC Machining Excellence in Romania

With over 20 years of expertise, OLSTRAL is a leading company in Romania specializing in CNC machining for aviation parts and a wide range of other high-precision applications. Our commitment to customer satisfaction sets us apart, making us the preferred partner in the industry.

We provide safe and secure CNC solutions utilizing the latest technologies to meet your exact needs. Our motto — "Our solution. Your future." — reflects our dedication to driving your success. Quality and service are our highest priorities.

  • Over two decades of market presence in Romania
  • Specializing in CNC machining for aviation parts and high-accuracy components
  • Customer-oriented approach with personalized solutions
  • Continuous improvement leveraging collective expertise
  • Long-term partnerships contributing to clients' sustained success
  • Cost-optimized series production with consistent availability
Partner With OLSTRAL
ABOUT
Home › Company › About Us

About Us

Our Strengths

We are a young and dynamic company with a strong organization which allows us a high level of reactivity and flexibility, delivering a range of services of customized solutions of proven technology determined by the requirements of different industries.

We are happy to advise you on the implementation of your products to ensure cost-optimized production as we combine new approaches with high reliability in our solutions for your inquiries.

  • Certified Supplier — ISO 9001:2015 & AS9100D by Lloyd's Register
  • 2µ Accuracy Grinding Capability for highly precise parts
  • Passion for constant innovation in process organization and digitalization
  • On-time delivery — process-oriented operational structure
  • High reactivity and flexibility for demanding orders
  • Cost-optimized production combining new approaches with high reliability
QUALITY
Home › Company › Quality

Quality Assurance

Product · Services · Process

At OLSTRAL, we deliver high-quality production — from single parts to large-scale series — with a focus on precision, reliability, and efficiency. We have implemented a Quality Management System certified according to ISO 9001:2015 and AS9100D, issued by LRQA (Lloyd's Register Quality Assurance).

ISO 9001Quality Management · 2015
AS9100DAerospace Standard · LRQA

Quality Policy

Our quality policy emphasizes the importance of our quality management system and its integrity when change occurs. The goals of our quality strategy are the optimization of internal processes in production, development and management, the reduction of quality costs and zero-fault quality for our products.

  • Optimization of internal processes in production, development and management
  • Reduction of quality costs and zero-fault quality for all products
  • Continual improvement and highest customer satisfaction standards
  • Quality awareness transmitted to all employees and suppliers
  • Seizing opportunities from innovative technologies and globalization
  • Profitable growth at the center of all efforts
INDUSTRIES
Home › Industries

Our Industries

OLSTRAL is an international company comprised of over 50 highly skilled employees. Our customers are among the leading companies nationally and internationally — this is why our manufactured parts can be found where the highest technical demands are to be met.

From the idea to the product — OLSTRAL offers its customers an integrated system solution: services from a single source for the creative implementation of innovative ideas in optimal solutions. With extensive engineering knowledge, solid know-how, modern production technologies and sophisticated test procedures, our highly motivated employees work for our customers — on time.

Primary Market

Precision parts for the most demanding industry. AS9100D certified by Lloyd's Register.

AEROSPACE
Home › Industries › Aerospace

Aerospace

Integrated Solutions

The aerospace industry is our primary market. We offer integrated solutions for this industry that has high requirements in terms of precision, surface quality, adherence to deadlines and quality assurance. Due to the high degree of flexibility in all areas of the company, we also keep the tightest deadlines even for demanding parts.

Our technical knowledge, high quality product standards and services, and an uncompromising focus on our customer requirements, have made us a reputable international service and product provider for the aviation industry. We are certified according to AS9100D by Lloyd's Register.

  • AS9100D certified by Lloyd's Register
  • Air-conditioned production and testing rooms
  • µ-precise machining of complex geometry
  • 100% fit, shape and position tolerance documentation
  • Long-term archiving of all process parameters
  • Fast reaction even for the tightest deadlines
Request a Quote
HYDRAULICS
Home › Industries › Hydraulics

Hydraulics

Integrated Solutions

The demands of the hydraulic sector can easily meet customers needs through years of experience delivering pumps, motors, transmissions, valves, cylinders and more. Whether you need a single component or a custom-engineered solution, OLSTRAL is your partner.

Working towards integrated solutions, we specialize in exciting and sophisticated development work. In our process chain, we leave nothing to chance. The production and testing of the drawing parts takes place exclusively in air-conditioned rooms.

  • Hydraulic systems, parts, controls and engineered solutions
  • Air-conditioned production and testing rooms
  • Proven process monitoring methods guarantee quality
  • Long-term archiving of all process parameters
  • On-time delivery guaranteed
  • Integrated solutions from a single source
Request a Quote
MACHINE BUILDING
Home › Industries › Machine Building

Machine Building

Integrated Solutions

OLSTRAL carries out construction of industrial machinery with modern CNC technologies for the manufacture of custom parts, sets of parts, assembly of machinery and prototypes.

The construction of intelligent industrial machinery brings together machine-man duplicity through production methods and processes. High-tech industrial customers are satisfied with our production capabilities because we focus on the technical details of robustness, accuracy and stability for complex applications.

  • Custom parts and complete machinery assembly
  • Robustness, accuracy and stability for complex applications
  • Air-conditioned production and testing rooms
  • Prototypes and serial production
  • Proven process monitoring methods
  • High-tech industrial customer base
Request a Quote
AUTOMATION
Home › Industries › Automation

Automation

Integrated Solutions

Our technical strategy concerning automated production is interconnected with Industry 4.0 principles. Modern robots, automatic gripper systems and pallet changers represent the entire productivity in our production.

The advantages are obvious: a quick change of a workpiece, as well as the process of the machining are monitored by the software and make work easier for the employees. One of our long-term goals is to increase the total performance of the machines and reduce stand-still time.

  • Industry 4.0 interconnected processes
  • Modern robots and automatic gripper systems
  • Pallet changers for fast workpiece change
  • Software-monitored machining process
  • Increased total machine performance
  • Reduced stand-still time and maintenance
Request a Quote
INDUSTRIAL
Home › Industries › Industrial Application

Industrial Application

Integrated Solutions

Based on extensive engineering knowledge and experience in CNC machining services, OLSTRAL provides precision machined parts for every kind of industry.

More and more industrial work processes are made easier by the use of machines. A lower failure rate, higher precision and faster performance are just a few reasons to be named. The development in this area is progressing steadily, with the invention of newer and more accurate machines on the agenda.

  • Precision parts for all industrial sectors
  • Lower failure rate and higher precision
  • Fast performance and machine support
  • Rapidly growing sector expertise
  • Innovative technologies readiness
  • Profitable growth-oriented approach
Request a Quote
MOTORSPORTS
Home › Industries › Motorsports

Motorsports

Integrated Solutions

The highly stressed parts in motorsports demand accuracy in all respects with its need for hundreds of small, perfectly-formed parts. Complex geometry µ-precise machining is guaranteed by our air-conditioned production and precise measuring equipment.

Materials such as titanium or MMC are also machined for this industry in order to meet our clients' specifications. The integration of CNC machinery with CAM helps reduce manufacturing time as well as ensuring the production of flawless components.

  • µ-precise machining of complex geometry
  • Titanium and MMC materials machined
  • CNC + CAM integration for reduced manufacturing time
  • 100% tolerance documentation of all parts
  • Air-conditioned production rooms
  • Proven process monitoring methods
Request a Quote
TECHNOLOGY
Home › Technology

Our Technology

Our core competence lies in the precise production of sophisticated CNC milled parts, turned parts as well as grinded parts in small, medium or large sized series. Thanks to our specialized and modern CNC machines and quality control room (controlled temperature 20°C ±2°C) and precise measuring equipment, we assure high-quality components that meet our clients' specifications.

Complex Parts Machining

CNC milled and turned parts for aerospace, motorsports and mechanical engineering. Aluminum, copper, brass, steel, stainless steel.

Learn More

High Accuracy Grinding

2µ accuracy. Universal, internal, surface and 5-axis grinding centers. Titanium, steel, stainless steel. Machines ≤6 years old.

Learn More

Advanced Measuring

CMM Hexagon Global S Chrome, Mitutoyo RA-2100 roundtest. Controlled quality room at 20°C ±2°C.

Learn More
MACHINING
Home › Technology › Complex Parts Machining

Complex Parts Machining

High End Machining

Our core competence lies in the precise production of sophisticated CNC milled parts, turned parts as well as turned grinded parts in small and medium-sized series. A team of 50 employees works for high-tech sectors such as aerospace industry, motorsports, device technology and mechanical engineering.

Thanks to a high degree of flexibility in all areas of the company, we are able to process even complex orders optimally and meet the tightest deadlines. OLSTRAL is working 100% on CNC machines not older than 6 years.

  • In-House CAM Programming with hyperMILL
  • Engineering Solutions & Assembly Capability
  • Project Development on Request
  • New manufacturing capacity on request
  • Aluminum, copper, brass, steel, stainless steel
  • High end measuring department on-site

GRINDING
Home › Technology › High Accuracy Grinding

High Accuracy Grinding

CNC Grinding

Our core activity is in grinding of complex cylindrical parts and machining parts in tough materials. We also run high serial production or even small batches and prototypes. OLSTRAL works 100% on CNC machines not older than 6 years.

  • 2µ accuracy grinding capability
  • In-House CAM Programming with hyperMILL
  • High serial production and small batches
  • Titanium, steel, stainless steel
  • High end measuring department on-site
  • Quality control room — temperature controlled

Machine Specifications

MachineMax DiameterMax LengthAccuracy
Universal Cylindrical Grinding Machine400 mm1000 mm1 µm
Universal Cylindrical Grinding Machine (MARPOSS)300 mm1000 mm1 µm

MEASURING
Home › Technology › Advanced Measuring

Advanced Measuring

Best-in-Class Equipment

The quality of machined parts is provided by our high end measuring department and quality control room featuring best-in-class equipment. Thanks to our specialized and modern CNC machines and quality control room (controlled temperature 20°C ±2°C) and precise measuring equipment, we assure high-quality components that meet all clients' specifications.

EquipmentManufacturerType
CMM Global S ChromeHexagonCoordinate Measuring Machine
Roundtest RA-2100MitutoyoRoundness Testing
Hite Height GaugesTesaHeight Measurement
Roughness MeasuringMitutoyoSurface Roughness
Contour MeasuringMitutoyoContour Analysis
ProjectorSchneiderOptical Measuring
Nital Etch Inspection—Grinding Burns & Cracks Detection
CAREERS
Home › Careers

Join Our Team

Build Your Career With Us

Olstral is constantly seeking the best talent, from production roles to top-level leadership positions. We strongly believe that people are the core of our success, and the continuous growth of our company relies on our ability to attract dedicated and passionate professionals eager to contribute to our progress.

"You become what you believe."

We are committed to constant improvement, and every individual who joins us brings a unique and valuable perspective, helping us excel in everything we do. In a dynamic and competitive environment, our diverse and ambitious team inspires us to stay innovative and continuously push our limits.

Open Positions

Senior Quality Engineer

We're seeking a Senior Quality Engineer to lead quality assurance in production. You'll manage quality control, audits, KPIs, and corrective actions while working with teams and stakeholders to ensure high standards. If you have strong analytical skills and industrial experience, join us!

Apply Now

CNC Operator

We are seeking a skilled CNC Operator to set up, operate, and maintain CNC machines to produce high-quality parts according to specifications. The ideal candidate should have experience with reading technical drawings, adjusting machine settings, and ensuring precision in production. Responsibilities include monitoring machine performance, conducting quality checks, and troubleshooting issues during the production process.

Apply Now

Tool & Device Coordinator

We are looking for a Tool and Device Coordinator to oversee the management, maintenance, and optimization of tools and devices used in production. You will ensure their availability, proper functioning, and calibration while collaborating with production and maintenance teams to support an efficient and high-quality process. Strong organizational and technical skills required.

Apply Now
